invariant: The get_entity_context Read ability preserves legacy entity_context_entries parity for the requested account while the fixture also seeds the DOS-283 same-domain, cross-account renewal, paraphrase-corroboration, trust-band, and wrong-subject adversarial substrate rows for downstream gates.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = output remains byte-identical to the legacy entity_context_entries projection for dos287-target-example, excludes adjacent/sibling account rows, and the seeded substrate rows expose six corroborations, three trust bands, the parent renewal meeting, and the WrongSubject tombstone for downstream fixture gates. FAIL = foreign account notes appear, order changes, source_asof/user provenance is missing, or any v3 substrate row is absent.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Copies the DOS-287 bundle-1 reproduction seed pattern with parent, target, adjacent account, domains, stakeholders, and synthetic entity_context_entries. Adds a same-domain sibling account, a parent-level renewal meeting that legitimately touches the target and sibling, claim_corroborations for six paraphrases of one target account claim, three target-account trust-band claims, and a WrongSubject feedback tombstone. Claim rows are marked dormant for legacy rendering so DOS-411 can cut over the read shape without changing the fixture path.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Empty because DOS-218 is a pure Read ability and makes no provider calls.
fixture_design_notes.external_replay: Empty because DOS-218 is a pure Read ability and makes no external service calls.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: The two target account context entries ordered by created_at DESC, matching the legacy command DTO shape. It is intentionally unchanged until DOS-411 migrates bundle-1 reads to claim-backed context.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Direct user source attribution for each returned row plus fixture-level assertions for the v3 substrate rows.
v3_scenarios: cross-account renewal meeting against the parent account with the same-domain sibling in scope
six paraphrases of the target renewal-owner claim collapsed through claim_corroborations
trust-band diversity against dos287-target-example: likely_current, use_with_caution, needs_verification
WrongSubject feedback tombstone for a renewal-owner claim that landed on the parent account
